title: Recurrent Pneumonia and Poor Growth - Cystic Fibrosis
chief_complaint: 3-year-old with recurrent pneumonia (3 episodes in past year), chronic productive cough, foul-smelling greasy stools, and poor weight gain since birth. Parents report salty-tasting skin when kissing child.

physical_exam.chest: Bilateral coarse crackles, mild hyperinflation, digital clubbing
physical_exam.abdomen: Distended, palpable fecal mass in LLQ

correct_diagnosis: Cystic Fibrosis (CFTR Mutation) with Pancreatic Insufficiency and Chronic Pseudomonas Infection
key_learning_points: Salty sweat + recurrent pneumonia + steatorrhea = classic triad

patient_responses.cough: He's had a cough since he was a baby
patient_responses.stools: His poop is greasy, floats, and smells very bad
patient_responses.skin: He tastes salty when we kiss him
patient_responses.growth: He eats a lot but doesn't gain weight

feedback.correct_message: Excellent! CF diagnosed - this explains all his symptoms.
feedback.incorrect_message: This is cystic fibrosis. The sweat chloride >60 + symptoms are diagnostic.
feedback.attending_note: CF management: Pancreatic enzymes (Creon) with all meals/snacks, high-calorie diet, fat-soluble vitamins (ADEK). Airway clearance (chest PT, vest), dornase alfa, hypertonic saline. Pseudomonas eradication: inhaled tobramycin + oral ciprofloxacin. CF center multidisciplinary care.
